children.heading: Determination and establishment of reasonable value of care and treatment
children.label: a Determination and establishment of reasonable value of care and treatment
children.text: The President may prescribe regulations to carry out this chapter, including regulations with respect to the determination and establishment of the reasonable value of the hospital, medical, surgical, or dental care and treatment (including prostheses and medical appliances) furnished or to be furnished.

children.heading: Settlement, release and waiver of claims
children.label: b Settlement, release and waiver of claims
children.text: To the extent prescribed by regulations under subsection (a), the head of the department or agency of the United States concerned may (1) compromise, or settle and execute a release of, any claim which the United States has by virtue of the right established by ; or (2) waive any such claim, in whole or in part, for the convenience of the Government, or if he determines that collection would result in undue hardship upon the person who suffered the injury or disease resulting in care or treatment described in .section 2651 of this titlesection 2651 of this title

children.heading: Damages recoverable for personal injury unaffected
children.label: c Damages recoverable for personal injury unaffected
children.text: No action taken by the United States in connection with the rights afforded under this legislation shall operate to deny to the injured person the recovery for that portion of his damage not covered hereunder.
